description: Taxonomy of migration failure modes - cases where reports/dashboards were technically migrated successfully but rejected by business users.

metric_type_change.name: Metric Type Change
metric_type_change.description: Report appears similar but measures a fundamentally different metric
examples: Pipeline report changed from ARR to TCV without labeling
Win rate switched from count-based to value-based
Revenue report changed from bookings to recognized revenue
rootCauses: Field mapping used Amount instead of ARR__c
Filter logic implicitly changed denominator definition
Aggregation changed from SUM to COUNT
prevention: Validate inferred metricId matches before and after
Require explicit metric definition ID in report metadata
Run semantic diff with metric drift detection

date_window_shift.name: Date Window Shift
examples: THIS_FISCAL_QUARTER → THIS_QUARTER caused 3-week shift
LAST_90_DAYS → LAST_QUARTER changed from rolling to fixed window
CloseDate filter changed to CreatedDate
rootCauses: Fiscal/calendar confusion in date filter migration
Relative date range not equivalent across orgs
Date field mapping error
prevention: Detect fiscal vs calendar semantic changes
Compare row counts at date boundaries
Require explicit date field role validation

population_scope_change.name: Population Scope Change
population_scope_change.description: Report includes/excludes different records than expected
examples: Closed Lost now excluded from win rate denominator
Renewals mixed with new business without segmentation
Owner filter changed from individual to team
rootCauses: Filter logic not equivalent after migration
Record type mapping incomplete
Sharing rules differ between orgs
prevention: Compare record counts pre/post migration
Validate key record presence (named accounts, top deals)
Document filter intent, not just syntax

visual_mismatch.name: Visual Mismatch
visual_mismatch.description: Data correct but presentation doesn't meet expectations

chart_type_change.name: Chart Type Change
chart_type_change.description: Different visualization obscures or distorts insight
examples: Funnel chart converted to bar chart - lost narrowing visual
Line chart to area chart - trends harder to compare
Gauge without breakpoints lost target context
rootCauses: Automated migration defaulted to simpler chart type
Chart type not supported in target format
Manual recreation missed visualization intent
prevention: Document intended visualization pattern
Validate chart type matches data pattern
Preserve gauge breakpoints and targets

layout_degradation.name: Layout Degradation
layout_degradation.description: Dashboard structure makes insights harder to find
examples: Primary KPI moved from top-left to bottom
Components resized uniformly, lost visual hierarchy
Action items separated from related metrics
rootCauses: Grid layout constraints differ between systems
Automated migration didn't preserve importance ranking
Manual layout recreation by non-expert
prevention: Document component importance and placement rationale
Validate F-pattern visual hierarchy preserved
Size primary KPIs larger than supporting metrics

performance_regression.name: Performance Regression
performance_regression.description: Report works but is too slow to be useful

load_time_increase.name: Load Time Increase
load_time_increase.description: Report loads significantly slower than before
examples: 2-second report now takes 30+ seconds
Dashboard timeout on initial load
Users abandon report before data displays
rootCauses: Additional joins from changed report type
Unindexed custom fields in filters
Cross-object rollups recalculated on each view
prevention: Benchmark load time before/after migration
Validate filter fields are indexed
Limit dashboard to 5-7 components

truncation_surprise.name: Truncation Surprise
truncation_surprise.description: Report silently truncates data user expected to see
examples: Summary report shows 2,000 rows but org has 8,000
Matrix pivot incomplete due to cell limits
Export appears complete but missing records
rootCauses: Format change from TABULAR to SUMMARY
Row count grew past 2,000 threshold
User unaware of format limitations
prevention: Estimate row count before migration
Use TABULAR for data export use cases
Add row count warning to reports near limit

context_loss.name: Context Loss
context_loss.description: Report technically correct but missing business context

missing_targets.name: Missing Targets
missing_targets.description: Metrics shown without benchmarks or goals
examples: Pipeline shown as $2M but target unknown
Win rate 25% but no industry benchmark
Quota attainment without quota values
rootCauses: Target values hardcoded in old system
Benchmark data not migrated
Formula fields referencing deleted objects
prevention: Document all benchmark/target sources
Validate gauge breakpoints have values
Include target context in report description

lost_drill_down.name: Lost Drill-Down
examples: Dashboard metrics no longer clickable
Detail report links broken
Action list not navigable
rootCauses: Source report IDs not updated in dashboard
Drill-through permissions not granted
Detail report deleted during cleanup
prevention: Validate all drill-through links post-migration
Maintain report-to-dashboard dependency map
Test navigation from every component

orphaned_documentation.name: Orphaned Documentation
orphaned_documentation.description: Report assumptions and usage notes not migrated
examples: Report purpose unclear to new users
Calculation methodology undocumented
Known limitations not communicated
rootCauses: Description field not migrated
Wiki/Confluence links broken
Tribal knowledge not captured
prevention: Migrate report descriptions and notes
Update documentation links
Add methodology section to exec reports

trust_failure.name: Trust Failure
trust_failure.description: Users don't believe the migrated report is correct

number_mismatch.name: Number Mismatch
number_mismatch.description: Totals don't match what users expected
examples: Pipeline $500k lower than CEO's spreadsheet
Win rate 5% different from sales manager's calculation
Booking total doesn't match finance report
rootCauses: Different filter logic produces different totals
Currency conversion differences
Timing of data refresh varies
prevention: Reconcile totals with known sources before release
Document any expected differences and reasons
Run parallel for one reporting period

missing_records.name: Missing Records
missing_records.description: Known accounts, deals, or entities not appearing
examples: Top 10 deals list missing Acme Corp
My pipeline doesn't show expected opportunities
Customer health missing key accounts
rootCauses: Record type not included in filter
Sharing rules exclude records for user
Object relationship broken
prevention: Validate key record presence with stakeholders
Test with actual user credentials
Compare named entity lists pre/post

items.name: Total Sum Match
items.question: Do primary aggregate values match within 1% tolerance?

items.name: Row Count Reasonable
items.question: Does row count match expectation within 10%?

items.name: Key Records Present
items.question: Do expected accounts/deals appear in results?
items.manualCheck: Provide list of 5-10 key records to verify

items.name: Trend Direction Correct
items.question: Do charts show trends in expected direction?

items.name: Drill-Through Works
items.question: Can users click through to detail reports?

items.name: Load Time Acceptable
items.question: Does report load within performance targets?

items.name: Targets Present
items.question: Are benchmarks and targets visible where expected?
items.manualCheck: Verify gauge breakpoints and goal lines

items.name: Documentation Updated
items.question: Is report description and methodology documented?
items.manualCheck: Review description field and linked wiki

guardrails.description: Automated guardrails to prevent failure modes

rules.trigger: Inferred metric type changed with confidence > 60%
rules.message: Migration appears to change metric definition. Requires explicit approval.
Date filter semantic change detected. Verify reporting period alignment.
Row count variance exceeds threshold. Validate population scope.
Total value mismatch detected. Reconcile with source before release.
Report may hit 2,000 row limit. Consider TABULAR format.
Chart type changed. Verify visualization intent preserved.
